subject: Login page returns 500 for all users in EU region
description: Production outage — customers can't sign in since 06:12 UTC. Affecting tier-1 customer Contoso.

subject: Dashboard chart colors hard to read
description: Minor accessibility complaint — the green/red palette is hard for color-blind users.

subject: Possible data loss on bulk export
description: User reports their last export was empty. Suspect data loss in the export pipeline.

subject: Feature request: dark mode for the admin UI
description: Nice-to-have UX request, no customer impact, multiple users mentioned it.

subject: Customer impact: invoice PDF missing line items
description: Production issue — Acme (named tier-1 customer) reports invoices generated yesterday have no line items.
